title: Best SEO Tools for Agencies in 2026
description: A comparison of the best SEO platforms for agencies managing multiple client accounts, including pricing, project limits, and white-label capabilities.
body:
Agencies managing SEO for multiple client accounts face unique requirements that in-house teams do not. Project capacity, white-label reporting, team collaboration features, and API access for automated reporting are critical considerations. This guide evaluates the leading SEO platforms from an agency perspective.

## Ahrefs for Agencies

Ahrefs offers several tiers suitable for agency use. The Standard plan at $249 per month supports up to 20 projects and includes core SEO analysis tools. The Advanced plan at $449 per month supports up to 50 projects and adds API access, which is valuable for agencies that build automated reporting workflows. The Enterprise plan at $1,499 per month supports up to 100 projects with priority support, making it appropriate for large agencies managing extensive client portfolios.

Ahrefs is strong for agencies that prioritize backlink analysis, site audits, and rank tracking. Its white-label report capabilities allow agencies to present client-facing reports without Ahrefs branding.

## SEMrush for Agencies

SEMrush's Guru plan at $249.95 per month supports 15 projects with content marketing tools and historical data. The Business plan at $499.95 per month supports 40 projects with API access and white-label reports, making it the appropriate tier for most agencies. Agencies should note that SEMrush Classic plans are distinct from SEMrush One, a separate product line combining SEO with AI visibility tools.

SEMrush is well-suited for agencies that offer combined SEO and PPC services, as its platform covers both disciplines.

## Moz for Agencies

Moz offers SEO tools with tiered pricing for agencies managing multiple client campaigns. Current plan details and limits are available on Moz's pricing page. Moz's educational resources and community support can be valuable for agencies training junior SEO staff.

## Key Features for Agency Use

When evaluating SEO platforms for agency use, prioritize project capacity to ensure you can serve all clients without upgrading mid-contract, white-label reporting for professional client presentations, API access for automated data extraction and reporting, team collaboration features for managing multiple contributors, and client access options for sharing dashboards and reports. Many agencies combine Ahrefs for backlink analysis with SEMrush for competitive research and supplement with specialized tools for technical audits or content optimization.
author: PilotStack Team
